blocks.content: After class. The hallway. Jonathan was already in the hall when I came out, which meant he'd moved fast from wherever he was.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: She looked at you when she said that.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Crystal. In English. I was at the window passing the hall and I looked in at exactly the wrong moment. Or the right one. She looked at you when she said that thing about wanting something out loud.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You were spying through the window.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I was passing by and the universe handed me information. What am I supposed to do, not look?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bro. She is telling you things without telling you things. You know that right.

He walked off. I stood in the hallway for a second with the weight of it — a girl I'd known for three weeks had said something out loud in front of a class and then looked at me, and the only person in my life who noticed was Jonathan Michaels who had been watching through a window.
